name: Epilepsy - EEG Procedure Query
description: **Fifth Procedure-resource phenotype.** Tests ability to find epilepsy patients via electroencephalogram (EEG) — the standard diagnostic test for seizure disorders. EEG is non-invasive (different from biopsy in PCa, polysomnography in OSA, colonoscopy in CRC, and CABG/PCI in CHD).
prompt: Find patients who have undergone an electroencephalogram (EEG) procedure.

prompts.broad: Find Procedure resources for electroencephalogram (EEG) — the diagnostic test that records electrical activity in the brain, used to diagnose epilepsy and other seizure disorders.
prompts.expert: I need Procedure resources for EEG. Use SNOMED code 54550000 (Electroencephalogram). Query: Procedure?code=http://snomed.info/sct|54550000

metadata.algorithm_path_description: Patients with EEG. **Fifth Procedure-resource phenotype** in suite (after CHD revasc, sleep apnea polysomnography, CRC colonoscopy, prostate biopsy). Non-invasive diagnostic test.
